TitleStudy: Underestimated Sink of Atmospheric Mercury in a Deglaciated Forest Chronosequence
Location: Mt. Gongga Area Hailuogou National Forest Park- Sichuan- China
MethodLitterfall: Monthly litterfall samples were collected by 1m×1m nylon nets hanging at 0.3 m above ground at five random locations at each site during September
MethodThroughfall: 5 L of water (about 10-35 ng Hg) were collected by a precipitation collector and filtered through cellulose membranes with 0.45-μm pore size. Sept 2017 - Sept 2019
